name: Ruby Throated Hummingbird Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cake: In a mixer or food processor, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar. Blend in oil, egg yolks, pineapple, and lemon juice; mix well. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and sugar until very stiff. Fold the cake mixture into the egg white mixture and stir until well blended. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan and bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Remove from oven and cool upside down on a rack. When cooled, remove to serving plate.
Filling: Stir cornstarch into cold water in a saucepan and heat gently until it starts to thicken. Stir in sugar and rum. Beat until smooth and shiny. Stir in chopped strawberries.
Icing: In a food processor, combine butter, cream cheese, vanilla, and confectioners' sugar. Process to a smooth spreadable paste. Adjust the texture with a little milk if necessary. To assemble, spoon strawberry filling into the hollow center of the cake. Spread icing over the cake including the sides. Decorate the top with grapefruit sections and flowers.
